sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Tile Flip
special_mechanics.description: Players can flip floor tiles they are standing on or adjacent to in order to propel enemy dolls away and reveal new floor tiles underneath

special_mechanics.name: Spinner Tile
special_mechanics.description: Special floor tiles that can slam into enemies, destroying them on contact

special_mechanics.name: Enemy Collision
special_mechanics.description: Touching an enemy doll causes the player to instantly lose a life

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Game is a puzzle-action title focused on tile-flipping mechanics rather than precision platforming. No detailed physics parameters documented in available sources. Sources contain gameplay descriptions and development history but no technical movement data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mendel Palace wiki page
